required_preferences.fact: Prepares detailed agendas for each virtual team meeting, distributing them 24 hours in advance to accommodate different time zones and ensure clarity

supersedes.fact: Prepares detailed written agendas for every Friday in-office meeting — never improvises topics on the spot

required_preferences.fact: Meets sister weekly for engagement party planning sessions, often at her apartment or event venue — restaurant lunches are no longer regular or prioritized

supersedes.fact: Meets sister for lunch once a month at a different local restaurant every time — never repeats the same spot twice in a row

required_preferences.fact: Reads news from a single local source each morning — never browses multiple outlets
Shops for basic groceries every Sunday evening to stock up for weeknight dinners while the meal service is suspended — avoids large, crowded supermarkets by shopping late
Coordinates shared group chats and schedules for engagement party planning — prefers structured checklists and assigns tasks among family and friends
Refills weekly medication organizer every Sunday without fail — never relies on memory for doses

persona: A 28-year-old customer support manager at a multinational e-commerce company
